name: Deviled Eggs and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Deviled Eggs according to Recipe 19.
2. Microwave onion and margarine in a 1 1/2-Qt casserole on high (100%) until onion is tender, about 1½ to 2 minutes.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients.
4. Microwave until hot, 5 to 6 minutes.
5. Arrange eggs on noodles.
6. Microwave until eggs are hot, 1 to 2 minutes.
